creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
This commit (graphics/djvulibre) seems to have totally ignored my PR.  :(

The graphics/djvulibre port should have been named libdjvu++.  It builds 
a subset of the same utilities (but no Mozilla plugin!).  However, 
graphics/djvulibre is the AT&T code and NOT djvulibre in ANY sense.  I'm 
sorry I've been slow to make the changes requested by lioux--I've been 
very ill until quite recently which has slowed me down.  However, the 
graphics/djvulibre commit makes my life harder than necessary.  :)

Please rename the graphics/djvulibre commit.

Thanks!

--
jmc
